rules.name: console-output
rules.message: echo/print/var_dump — use a PSR-3 logger (Monolog) instead.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables; load via getenv() or framework config.

rules.name: code-execution
rules.message: Dynamic code/command execution — high risk of injection.
rules.fix_hint: Avoid dynamic execution; use escapeshellarg() if shell commands are unavoidable.

rules.name: sql-concatenation
rules.message: SQL string concatenation — risk of SQL injection.
rules.fix_hint: Use PDO prepared statements with parameterized queries.

rules.name: catch-throwable
rules.message: Catching \Throwable — catches Error (OOM, type errors) along with exceptions.
rules.fix_hint: Catch \Exception or specific exception types; let fatal Errors propagate.

rules.name: loose-comparison
rules.message: Loose comparison (==) — type juggling produces surprising results in PHP.
rules.fix_hint: Use strict comparison (===) to avoid type coercion.

rules.name: error-suppression
rules.message: @ error suppression operator — hides bugs and makes debugging impossible.
rules.fix_hint: Remove @ and handle the error explicitly with try/catch or null checks.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named methods or use early returns.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a class constant or const with a descriptive name.
